entry.title: Lab 01
entry.summary: In Lab 1, I set up my file server on Microsfot Azure, created a GitHub account, and linked our GitHub, servers, and local machines. A set of screenshots are included.

entry.title: Lab 02
entry.summary: In Lab 2, I started working wtih HTML and CSS. I created a resume with it, and is included.

entry.title: Lab 03
entry.summary: In Lab 3, I created the foundation of this website. I used both HTML and external CSS to style my site.

entry.title: Lab 04
entry.summary: In Lab 4, I created both RSS and Atom XML files to contain data about all labs completed in ITWS 1100.
